reference_transcript: Thanks for calling billing support, my name is Sam. How can I help today? Just so you know, this call is recorded for quality purposes. There's a charge on my card I don't recognize at all. Okay, let me pull up the recent charges and take a look. So one of these looks like a duplicate. I can flag it for a refund. I just want to make sure this doesn't happen again next month. No, that's not good enough. Get me someone who can actually fix this. That's fair. I'll escalate this to a manager so we can sort it properly. I've applied the refund and you'll see it in three to five days. Anything else? No, that's everything. Thanks for the help.
